data.title: Donegal Group Inc. (NASDAQ:DGICA) and (NASDAQ:DGICB) announce quarterly dividends of $0.1825 per share for Class A and $0.165 per share for Class B stocks, payable on Nov 17, 2025.
data.description: In Marietta, Pennsylvania, on October 16, 2025, Donegal Group Inc. announced that their board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1825 per share for the Company's Class A common stock and $0.165 per share for the Company's Class B common stock. The dividends will be disbursed on November 17, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 3, 2025. The company's stock trades under the tickers NASDAQ: DGICA and NASDAQ: DGICB.

data.title: Molex to acquire Smiths Interconnect to boost aerospace defense with $5B revenue, also focusing on semiconductor, medical markets.
data.description: Smiths Interconnect supplies essential components to the aerospace and defense industry, which has a market value of $5 billion. They also serve the semiconductor test, industrial, and medical sectors. Their expertise in creating cutting-edge medical interconnect solutions complements Molex's existing strengths in the market.
Netanyahu speaks to Trump - reports

data.title: US and DRC co-host Economic and Investment Forum in Washington, D.C. to bolster ties; senior officials attend.
data.description: In Washington on October 16, 2025, the U.S. and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) collaborated to host the U.S.–DRC Economic and Investment Forum. This two-day event brought together senior officials from both nations to discuss economic and investment opportunities.

data.title: Greenius partners with The Grow Group to launch 11 sales training courses for landscape professionals - collaboration announced on Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: Professional landscapers now have the opportunity to benefit from an exclusive partnership between Greenius, a Granum product, and The Grow Group. In this collaboration, Landscape sales professionals can access a total of 11 impactful courses curated by Marty Grunder. This partnership was officially launched on October 16, 2025, and is set to provide valuable insights and knowledge to professionals in Atlanta and Toronto.

data.title: Execs from Gemini, Ripple, and Coinbase donate to Trump at ballroom fundraiser at White House, as per report.
data.description: According to reports, individuals from Gemini, Ripple, and Coinbase were present at a fundraising dinner at the White House on Wednesday night.

data.title: Bitcoin price at $108,574.22 as Dogecoin, Ethereum, XRP continue to drop. Over $693.09 million liquidated in 24 hours. Betters predict 60% chance of Bitcoin falling below $100,000 before 2026. Corporate Bitcoin adoption up 40% in Q3.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped below $110,000 on Thursday amidst ongoing ETF outflows and prevailing nervous sentiment. Cryptocurrency prices: Bitcoin at $108,574.22, Ethereum at $3,899.85, Solana at $188.91, XRP at $2.35, Dogecoin at $0.1901, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001009. Coinglass data revealed 209,757 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, totaling $693.09 million. Top losers in the past day were Zcash, Story, and Plasma. According to Polymarket, there is a 60% probability (up from 40% on Oct. 14) of Bitcoin falling below $100,000 before 2026. Corporate Bitcoin adoption saw a 40% surge in Q3, as per a report. For a detailed story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: RightOfTheDot (ROTD) to host Bid-to-Earn auction at Domain Days Dubai 2025; featuring Tokens.com and top Web3 digital assets.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, RightOfTheDot (ROTD), a prominent company specializing in premium domain auctions, brokerage, and digital asset advisory, is set to organize a groundbreaking Bid-to-Earn (BTE) auction as part of Domain Days Dubai 2025. This event will bring together Web2 and Web3 technologies, showcasing the intersection of traditional and emerging digital innovations. This auction is expected to attract significant attention from global investors and industry leaders due to its unique approach and potential for driving advancements in the digital sector.

data.title: Solana's price faces $186 support test, $400M outflows causing pressure as Andreessen Horowitz invests $50M in Solana's Jito Foundation.
data.description: Solana (SOL) is currently facing a critical challenge as it struggles to maintain support at the $186 mark. The market is experiencing significant pressure from almost $400 million in outflows, posing a threat of pushing the token's value down. This development coincides with a noteworthy investment, where Andreessen Horowitz's a16z crypto branch is injecting $50 million into Solana staking giant Jito Foundation. Solana's price is hovering around $188 after a failed attempt to sustain levels above $200, highlighting the bearish trend. TradingView charts indicate that SOL is retesting lower levels, emphasizing the uncertainty surrounding its performance.

data.title: NSC urges parents to educate teens during National Teen Driver Safety Week as more than 2,700 teens lost lives in car crashes in the U.S. in 2023.
data.description: In the United States, motor vehicle crashes continue to be the primary cause of preventable deaths among teenagers. In 2023, over 2,700 teenagers lost their lives in car accidents, highlighting the concerning trend. This data underscores the importance of initiatives like National Teen Driver Safety to address this critical issue and promote safe driving practices among young drivers.
The Fed: Lenders should be resilient to a range of factors.

data.title: American Autonomy, Inc. unveils software platform for U.S. agriculture, empowering farmers and drone makers. Iowa, Oct 16, 2025.
data.description: A company based in Iowa City, American Autonomy, Inc., announced on Oct. 16, 2025, a new software platform aimed at empowering farmers with control over their drone data. This initiative is expected to provide agricultural drone operators with enhanced capabilities, while also offering drone manufacturers a competitive advantage in the market.

data.title: Princess Cruises announced 70 sailings on 13 itineraries from Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Vancouver for the 2027/2028 season.
data.description: Princess Cruises has unveiled its upcoming 2027-2028 West Coast season, featuring 70 sailings across 13 itineraries departing from Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Vancouver. The cruise line will offer passengers a variety of warm-weather getaways to escape the cooler months. The season is set to commence from Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on October 16, 2025.

data.title: New from Character.AI: 'Scenes' for immersive storytelling, adding character-driven role-play moments to enhance user experience.
data.description: Character.AI has unveiled a new feature called 'Scenes', which allows users to craft compelling storytelling experiences by incorporating character-centered role-play elements. This update is geared towards enhancing user engagement and creativity on the platform. By utilizing 'Scenes', users can create more immersive and interactive scenarios, adding depth to their narratives. This new feature is aimed at fostering a more dynamic and engaging user experience within the app.
